subcodes.first_line: O spiritual, luminous and divinely-guided one! For some time that distinguished personage hath not penned any letter to bring joy to those who eagerly await it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحانیا نورانیا ربانیا مدتیست که تحریری از آنشخص خطیر مشتاقانرا تسریر ننمود و
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @being a source of light; guidance, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @bringing forth results; fruit
